narrative:
Batavia Township D (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,339 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.3 percentage points.
